samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand A (multiplicand).</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand B (multiplier).</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output for the product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Initialize the product to zero at the beginning of the computation.</description>
            <if condition="'reset == 1'b1'">
                <then>
                    <assign statement="'product' = 16'b0;"/>
                </then>
            </if>
            <description>Initialize the partial product with the first multiplicand.</description>
            <if condition="'reset == 1'b0'">
                <then>
                    <assign statement="'product' = {{8'b0}, A};"/>
                </then>
            </if>
            <description>Iterate over the bits of the multiplier.</description>
            <for>
                <description>Range of the multiplier bits.</description>
                <from>0</from>
                <to>7</to>
                <step>1</step>
                <loop>
                    <description>Check if the current bit of the multiplier is set.</description>
                    <if condition="'B[i] == 1'b1'">
                        <then>
                            <description>Add the shifted multiplicand to the partial product.</description>
                            <assign statement="'product' = product + (A << i);"/>
                        </then>
                    </if>
                </loop>
            </for>
        </sequential_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
